_doc: Declared routing contract for event_kernel/dispatcher.js. Source of truth for the NON-DERIVABLE facts of each event route: which policy context an event evaluates (policyContext) and a human-readable handler summary. dispatcher.js reads policyContext from here at dispatch time, so a route's policy context cannot drift from this file. The verify_coherence DispatcherRouteContractVerifier diffs this against the switch cases in dispatcher.js (every case must appear here; every entry must have a case). Adding/removing an event case REQUIRES editing this file or the verifier fails.

routes.handler: retry guard, pre-write check, unified policies, native pretool, pretooluse shell chain
unified policies under the PreToolUse context (Codex approval prompts reuse PreToolUse policies)
post-tool evidence, unified policies, native posttool, posttooluse shell chain
